# SM64EX SekaiLink Edition

Upstream: https://github.com/N00byKing/sm64ex

Pinned source commit: `9289288f241cd03c3287306c715eca0755333075`

The patch brands the managed build and documents the existing Archipelago command-line contract.
Client Core launches generated `.apsm64ex` files with `--sm64ap_file` and an isolated save path.

The build requires a user-owned US Super Mario 64 ROM with SHA-1
`9bef1128717f958171a4afac3ed78ee2bb4e86ce`. ROM-derived files must never be committed,
uploaded, or included in a SekaiLink package.
